reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: An entire major section of the document is missing. Section 3, 'The Future Environment: Next Generation 911' (spanning pages 20-31 of the source PDF), is absent from the output. The output contains a placeholder tag '15 sections omitted for token budget', indicating that a significant portion of the document was not converted.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: 3. The Future Environment: Next Generation 911 (Section spanning pages 20 to 31)
concerns.output_quote: The entire section is missing between Section 2.3 and Section 4.
concerns.location: Between section 2.3 and 4, corresponding to source pages 20-31.

concerns.analysis: Two major tables in the appendices are severely truncated. The table in 'Appendix B – North Carolina Population by County' (pages 46-48) contains 101 data rows in the source but only 7 rows in the output before being truncated with '...'. The table in 'Appendix C—NENA NG911 Standards and Best Practices Reference Chart' (pages 49-50) contains approximately 45 rows in the source but only 3 in the output.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Appendix B (pages 46-48) containing 100 counties; Appendix C (pages 49-50) containing ~45 document entries.
concerns.output_quote: Appendix B table truncated after 7 entries; Appendix C table contains only 3 entries.
concerns.location: Appendix B (page 46 of output) and Appendix C (page 49 of output)

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: Several sections contain headings but are completely missing their corresponding body text. For example, Section 2.2.11 'Accountability' and Section 2.3 'Current 911 Infrastructure' on page 20 of the source have paragraphs of descriptive text that do not appear in the output.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Section 2.2.11: 'The fiscal officer of a PSAP...'; Section 2.3: 'In North Carolina, all 911 calls are answered...'
concerns.output_quote: Only the headings '2.2.11 Accountability' and '2.3 Current 911 Infrastructure' are present without content.

concerns.analysis: Several meaningful images from the source PDF are missing in the HTML rendering. The title page is missing the NC flag photo and the RSS company logo. More critically, 'Figure 1 – Simplified NENA i3 NG911 Conceptual System Diagram' on page 24 is missing (the caption is present but the image is not). Additionally, the two full-page financial spreadsheets on pages 31 and 32 (which are rendered as images in the PDF) are entirely absent from the HTML output.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Figure 1 diagram (page 24) and full-page financial spreadsheets for FY 21-22 and FY 22-23 (pages 31-32).
concerns.output_quote: The caption 'Figure 1 – Simplified NENA i3 NG911 Conceptual System Diagram' appears with no image. The financial tables are completely omitted between sections 3.3 and 4.

action_items: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.
